race.comment: SWAN DANCE (12) has shown promise in both starts to date, following up a debut placing with another strong effort when runner-up over 1800m at Casterton a fortnight ago. She should get every chance to break through. CAMELOT TIME (1) was forced to concede a sizeable start at Seymour when missing the kick before making late ground into fourth over 2040m. If he can begin with them, then he becomes a winning hope. CONVAAYA (2) put himself in the race early and boxed on for second at Donald over 2200m. The blinkers are back on, and he can go one better. CRISTARIA (9) is stepping out at this track for the first time. Last appeared when she finished fourth over 2007m at Kilmore on June 1. In the mix.
